description_short: Load, parse, and summarize PCAP network captures.
description_long: Core PCAP ingestion and summary tool. Uses scapy for streaming packet parsing to extract protocol distribution, IP endpoints, DNS queries, HTTP requests, TLS handshakes, OT/ICS protocol transactions (Modbus, DNP3, S7comm, EtherNet/IP-CIP, OPC-UA, BACnet, IEC-104), and cleartext credential detection. Stores parsed state in an in-memory PcapSession singleton for use by downstream network forensics tools. Supports local files and GCS URIs with a 50 MB file size limit.
author: Event Mill Contributors
